content_body:
What an idyllic paradise Serendipity has been.  As the owners of Cabin Rentals of Georgia we are always interested in the Guest Experience and how to make their mountain getaway as memorable and meaningul as we know it can be.

The owners of Serendipity, Gerry and Liz, are very dear longtime friends of ours and in creating this mountain paradise, they have thought of every luxurious amenity to make your stay here in this place unforgettable.  Gorgeous sunrises, romantic moonrises, luxurious hot tub soaks, jigsaw puzzle working, and movie watching are just some of the many enjoyable activities.  There's something magical about this place, and we hope each Guest who stays at Serendipity discovers the many blessings found here.  

Gary and Lissa Knight
title: An Idyllic Paradise in the North Georgia Mountains
